scripts.test: bun run build && bun test packages/core/src packages/runtime/src packages/exporter-claude-code/src packages/exporter-codex/src packages/exporter-cursor/src packages/exporter-openclaw/src packages/exporter-vscode-copilot/src
scripts.test:coverage: bun run build && bun test --coverage packages/core/src packages/runtime/src packages/exporter-claude-code/src packages/exporter-codex/src packages/exporter-cursor/src packages/exporter-openclaw/src packages/exporter-vscode-copilot/src
scripts.typecheck: bunx tsc -p packages/core/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx tsc -p packages/runtime/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx tsc -p packages/exporter-claude-code/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx tsc -p packages/exporter-codex/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx tsc -p packages/exporter-cursor/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx tsc -p packages/exporter-openclaw/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx tsc -p packages/exporter-vscode-copilot/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx tsc -p packages/cli/tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.precommit: bun run check && bun run typecheck && bun run test
